accurate.why: Correctly states the reauthorization through FY2029 and that CDC administers the program; the report and strategy requirements are accurately summarized.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; CDC administration of the program is accurate context.

correct_figures.why: FY2029 reauthorization matches the bill text (2025-2029).
